ogTitle: Katherine South vs Kilgariff: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Katherine South and Kilgariff.
heading: Katherine South vs Kilgariff — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Katherine South, Northern Territory and Kilgariff, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Katherine South has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Kilgariff (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Katherine South or Kilgariff safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Katherine South has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Kilgariff scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Katherine South scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Kilgariff scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Katherine South or Kilgariff?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Katherine South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
